prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-48PCTRUCK-MY020-PARENT-AMZ Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Giant Engines 1:32 Scale Semi Truck Construction Cargo Carrier Toy Set, Ages 3-12, Blue or Red Description: The Kidplokio GIANT ENGINES BIG RIG AUTO HAULER has a lot of fun packed into its cargo carrier. You and your little ones are about to build the best playtime ever.

This Kidplokio full set of construction vehicles with a large semi hauler cargo carrier will provide hours of entertainment and fun for children ages three and up, allowing for lots of mixing and matching. The complete construction play set comes with a large semi toy truck cargo carrier, a digger, a dump truck and a front loader truck, two of which can be switched out for a concrete mixer or concrete roller, doubling the fun. Kids can also change out the equipment of the smaller construction vehicles, while also play with the semi hauler in separation, slide, or transport mode. The playtime possibilities are endless.

With exciting and fun lights and sounds, kids will love pushing the buttons on the side of the construction semi toy truck cargo carrier, enhancing their imaginative pretend play adventures. The realistic sounds and flashing lights will boost your little ones' playtime to the next level as they rev the engine, honk the horn and drive to fun, exciting music.

Playtime can be exciting, imaginative AND educational with the Kidplokio construction semi toy truck cargo carrier set; with 48 pieces to work with, kids will develop both their fine and gross motor skills, as well as problem-solving and critical thinking skills as they work will all the toy components included with the construction cargo carrier play set.

And, when kids are all done playing for the day, the smaller construction vehicles fit nicely into the larger semi toy truck cargo carrier for storage, so no pieces are lost and everything stays organized.

AGE: 3+

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: boys toy play vehicle semi truck toys accessories for kids toy trucks cargo carrier boys dump construction themed christmas gifts birthday him unique 5 year old boy 4 12 6 7 10 8 3 13 11 9 4-5 age pretend play lights stocking stuffers Features: - GIANT ENGINES TOY TRUCK: You and your little ones are about to build the best playtime ever! This Kidplokio full set of construction vehicles will provide hours of DIY construction fun for children ages three and up; kids can change out the equipment of the smaller vehicles, while also play with the semi hauler in separation, slide or transport mode - CHANGE OUT CONSTRUCTION EQUIPMENT: The complete 48-piece construction play set features a large cargo carrier semi toy truck hauler, a digger, a dump truck and front loader truck, two of which can be changed out to be a concrete mixer and concrete roller for lots of mixing and matching; assembly instructions included - SENSORY LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: With fun lights and sounds, kids will love pushing the buttons on the side of the construction semi toy truck cargo carrier, enhancing their imaginative pretend play adventures; The realistic sounds and flashing lights will boost your little ones' playtime to the next level as they rev the engine, honk the horn and drive to fun, exciting music! - EDUCATIONAL LEARNING TOY: Playtime can be exciting, imaginative AND educational with the Kidplokio construction semi toy truck cargo carrier set; with 48 pieces to work with, kids will develop both their fine and gross motor skills, as well as problem-solving and critical thinking skills as they work will all the toy components - SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 23 x 10.5 x 4 inches; Color: Multi; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
